species.description_es: Cangrejo xántido con caparazón ovalado y 16 dientes en el borde frontal. Color café rojizo con pinzas oscuras. Habita bajo piedras y en grietas de arrecifes rocosos.
species.description_en: Xanthid crab with an oval carapace and 16 teeth on the front edge. Reddish-brown with dark claws. Lives under rocks and in crevices of rocky reefs.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Eduardo Dios Alemán, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Eduardo Dios Alemán

species.description_es: Pez plateado de cuerpo comprimido con manchas oscuras en el dorso. Forma cardúmenes en aguas costeras. Es un recurso pesquero importante en Chile central para harina de pescado.
species.description_en: Silvery compressed-bodied fish with dark spots on the back. Schools in coastal waters. An important fishery resource in central Chile for fishmeal.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Devon Bowen, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Devon Bowen

species.description_es: Pez robusto de color rojo anaranjado con cabeza espinosa y ojos grandes. Habita cuevas y grietas en arrecifes profundos. Es el cabrilla roja del sur de Chile, apreciado por pescadores.
species.description_en: Robust orange-red fish with a spiny head and large eyes. Inhabits caves and crevices in deep reefs. The southern Chilean rockfish, valued by fishermen.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Nicolas Olejnik, some rights reserved (CC BY), uploaded by Nicolas Olejnik

species.description_es: Cangrejo pequeño con caparazón espinoso de color café verdoso. Habita grietas y bajo piedras en el intermareal. Tiene pinzas fuertes y comportamiento agresivo al ser molestado.
species.description_en: Small crab with a spiny greenish-brown carapace. Lives in crevices and under rocks in the intertidal. Has strong claws and aggressive behavior when disturbed.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Garrett, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Garrett

species.description_es: Pez pelágico de color plateado con reflejos violáceos y cuerpo ovalado. Nada en cardúmenes en aguas costeras abiertas. Es apreciado como alimento y se vende en mercados chilenos.
species.description_en: Silvery pelagic fish with violet reflections and an oval body. Swims in schools in open coastal waters. Valued as food and sold in Chilean markets.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) matias saa, all rights reserved, uploaded by matias saa

species.description_es: Cangrejito porcelana diminuto que vive como comensal entre las espinas de erizos de mar patagónicos. Se alimenta de partículas del agua protegido por las espinas de su hospedero.
species.description_en: Tiny porcelain crab living as a commensal among the spines of Patagonian sea urchins. Feeds on water particles while protected by its host's spines.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Fernando Catrileo Necul, all rights reserved, uploaded by Fernando Catrileo Necul

species.description_es: Camarón acorazado de aguas profundas con caparazón cubierto de espinas y carenas. Color rojo anaranjado. Habita fondos batiales y es capturado ocasionalmente por pesqueras de profundidad.
species.description_en: Deep-water armored shrimp with a carapace covered in spines and ridges. Orange-red. Inhabits bathyal bottoms and is occasionally caught by deep-water fisheries.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Shallow Marine Surveys Group, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Shallow Marine Surveys Group

species.description_es: Estrella de mar blanda con una membrana que cubre sus brazos como un colchón inflado. Color café a rojo. Habita fondos profundos y puede inflar su membrana como defensa.
species.description_en: Soft sea star with a membrane covering its arms like an inflated cushion. Brown to red. Inhabits deep bottoms and can inflate its membrane as defense.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Tambja, some rights reserved (CC BY-SA)

species.description_es: Tiburón pequeño de aguas profundas con piel cubierta de dentículos granulares y espinas en las aletas dorsales. Color café oscuro. Habita la plataforma continental profunda.
species.description_en: Small deep-water shark with skin covered in granular denticles and dorsal fin spines. Dark brown. Inhabits the deep continental shelf.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Gonzalo Mucientes Sandoval, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Gonzalo Mucientes Sandoval

species.description_es: Pez de aguas profundas con cuerpo suave y gelatinoso de color marrón oscuro. Tiene ojos grandes y boca ancha. Habita la zona batipelágica y es rara vez capturado.
species.description_en: Deep-water fish with a soft, gelatinous dark brown body. Has large eyes and a wide mouth. Inhabits the bathypelagic zone and is rarely caught.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) ulrich zanabria, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by ulrich zanabria

species.description_es: Pez plateado con reflejos cobrizos y cuerpo comprimido lateralmente. Produce sonidos con su vejiga natatoria. Habita fondos rocosos y arenosos costeros, apreciado por pescadores artesanales.
species.description_en: Silvery fish with coppery reflections and a laterally compressed body. Produces sounds with its swim bladder. Inhabits coastal rocky and sandy bottoms, valued by artisanal fishers.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) pabloreyesl, all rights reserved

species.description_es: Lenguado de ojos pequeños con cuerpo aplanado café moteado. Se entierra en arena para acechar a sus presas. Es un recurso pesquero valioso en Chile central y norte.
species.description_en: Small-eyed flounder with a mottled brown flattened body. Buries in sand to ambush prey. A valuable fishery resource in central and northern Chile.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) MatiasG, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by MatiasG

additional_photos.attribution: (c) ianwalker, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)
(c) ianwalker, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)

species.description_es: Sepiola diminuta con cuerpo rechoncho y aletas redondeadas, de color rosado translúcido. Puede cambiar de color rápidamente. Habita fondos arenosos donde se entierra durante el día.
species.description_en: Tiny bobtail squid with a plump body and rounded fins, translucent pink. Can change color rapidly. Lives on sandy bottoms, burying itself during the day.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Danae, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Danae

species.description_es: Raya de aguas profundas con disco redondeado y cola fina sin espina. Color marrón oscuro uniforme. Habita fondos del talud continental a profundidades batiales.
species.description_en: Deep-water skate with a rounded disc and thin tail without a spine. Uniform dark brown. Inhabits continental slope bottoms at bathyal depths.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Gonzalo Bravo, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Gonzalo Bravo

species.description_es: Nudibranquio pequeño y translúcido con ceratas cortas. Se alimenta de hidroides y otros cnidarios sésiles. Es poco conocido y raramente fotografiado.
species.description_en: Small, translucent nudibranch with short cerata. Feeds on hydroids and other sessile cnidarians. Little-known and rarely photographed.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Robin Gwen Agarwal, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Robin Gwen Agarwal

additional_photos.attribution: (c) Jonatan Ferrada, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)
(c) Jonatan Ferrada, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)
(c) Jonatan Ferrada, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)

species.description_es: Nudibranquio eólido pequeño con ceratas blancos a rosados sobre cuerpo translúcido. Se alimenta de anémonas del género Aiptasia. Difícil de observar por su pequeño tamaño.
species.description_en: Small aeolid nudibranch with white to pinkish cerata on a translucent body. Feeds on Aiptasia anemones. Difficult to observe due to its small size.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Gary McDonald, all rights reserved, uploaded by Gary McDonald

additional_photos.attribution: (c) Nicolás Battini, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)
(c) Nicolás Battini, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)
(c) Daniel Fernando Vidal, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC)

species.description_es: Nudibranquio blanco con manchas amarillas a marrones dispersas por el dorso. Tiene textura granular suave y branquias plumosas blancas. Se encuentra bajo piedras alimentándose de esponjas.
species.description_en: White nudibranch with scattered yellow to brown spots across its back. Has a soft granular texture and white feathery gills. Found under rocks feeding on sponges.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) matias saa, all rights reserved, uploaded by matias saa

species.description_es: Caracolito diminuto con concha ovalada lisa de color café oscuro con una banda clara. Se encuentra sobre algas y rocas donde se alimenta de materia orgánica y microalgas.
species.description_en: Tiny snail with a smooth dark brown oval shell with a light band. Found on algae and rocks feeding on organic matter and microalgae.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) MichelleSuckel, all rights reserved, uploaded by MichelleSuckel

species.description_es: Anémona pequeña de color verdoso a café que se reproduce hermafroditamente. Forma grupos clonales en grietas y bajo piedras. Sus tentáculos son cortos y robustos.
species.description_en: Small greenish to brown anemone that reproduces hermaphroditically. Forms clonal groups in crevices and under rocks. Has short, robust tentacles.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Antonio W. Salas, some rights reserved (CC BY), uploaded by Antonio W. Salas

species.description_es: Alga roja laminar con frondas gruesas y gelatinosas de color rojo oscuro. Puede confundirse con otras algas rojas laminares. Crece en rocas sublitorales en aguas frías.
species.description_en: Laminar red alga with thick, gelatinous dark red fronds. Can be confused with other laminar red algae. Grows on subtidal rocks in cold waters.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) dschr, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by dschr

species.description_es: Esponja perforadora que excava galerías en conchas y rocas calcáreas. Solo se ven sus papilas amarillas asomando por los agujeros. Importante agente de bioerosión marina.
species.description_en: Boring sponge that excavates galleries in shells and calcareous rocks. Only its yellow papillae are visible poking through holes. An important marine bioerosion agent.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Erasmo Macaya Horta, some rights reserved (CC BY), uploaded by Erasmo Macaya Horta

species.description_es: Alga roja con frondas estrechas y aplanadas de color rojo oscuro. Crece en matas compactas sobre rocas del intermareal bajo. Se usa para la producción de agar-agar.
species.description_en: Red alga with narrow, flat dark red fronds. Grows in compact tufts on low intertidal rocks. Used for agar-agar production.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Erasmo Macaya Horta, some rights reserved (CC BY), uploaded by Erasmo Macaya Horta

species.description_es: Alga roja con frondas dicotómicas acanaladas de color rojo oscuro a púrpura. Textura cartilaginosa y flexible. Crece en el intermareal bajo y sublitoral somero.
species.description_en: Red alga with channeled dichotomous fronds, dark red to purple. Cartilaginous and flexible texture. Grows in the low intertidal and shallow subtidal.
species.habitat: Low intertidal and shallow subtidal rocks

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Rodrigo Silva Haun, all rights reserved, uploaded by Rodrigo Silva Haun

species.description_es: Camarón fantasma que cava madrigueras profundas en fondos arenosos y fangosos. Es casi transparente con tonos rosados. Sus madrigueras pueden ser enormes redes de túneles subterráneos.
species.description_en: Ghost shrimp that digs deep burrows in sandy and muddy bottoms. Nearly transparent with pinkish tones. Its burrows can be enormous underground tunnel networks.
species.habitat: Sandy and muddy intertidal and subtidal

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Bastian Riveros Flores, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Bastian Riveros Flores

species.description_es: Camarón pistola que produce un chasquido potente con su pinza agrandada. Vive en asociación con esponjas y anémonas. El sonido que produce puede aturdir a pequeñas presas.
species.description_en: Snapping shrimp producing a powerful snap with its enlarged claw. Lives in association with sponges and anemones. The sound it produces can stun small prey.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Diego Almendras G., some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Diego Almendras G.

species.description_es: Caracol grande con concha elegante y lisa de color café anaranjado. Es un molusco de aguas profundas poco conocido. La concha tiene forma de huso y es apreciada por coleccionistas.
species.description_en: Large snail with an elegant, smooth orange-brown shell. A little-known deep-water mollusk. The spindle-shaped shell is prized by collectors.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) ovillegas, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by ovillegas

species.description_es: Cangrejo de profundidad de color rojo intenso con caparazón redondeado y patas largas. Habita fondos batiales a cientos de metros de profundidad. Se captura con trampas de profundidad.
species.description_en: Deep-sea crab, intense red with a rounded carapace and long legs. Inhabits bathyal bottoms at hundreds of meters depth. Caught with deep-water traps.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Michael Weymann, all rights reserved, uploaded by Michael Weymann

species.description_es: Camarón pistola con una pinza grande con capucha que produce un chasquido fuerte. Color verdoso a café. Vive bajo piedras y entre anémonas en la zona intermareal.
species.description_en: Snapping shrimp with a large hooded claw that produces a loud snap. Greenish to brown. Lives under rocks and among anemones in the intertidal zone.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) ulrich zanabria, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by ulrich zanabria

species.description_es: Camarón pistola de color café a verdoso con una gran pinza asimétrica. Cava madrigueras en fondos arenosos y fangosos. El chasquido de su pinza es uno de los sonidos más fuertes del mar.
species.description_en: Snapping shrimp, brown to greenish with a large asymmetric claw. Digs burrows in sandy and muddy bottoms. Its claw snap is one of the loudest sounds in the sea.

primary_photo.attribution: (c) Ocean Networks Canada, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by Ocean Networks Canada

species.description_es: Pez alargado y gelatinoso de aguas profundas de color rosado a café. Tiene cabeza desnuda sin escamas y cuerpo blando. Habita fondos batiales del Pacífico sudoriental.
species.description_en: Elongated, gelatinous deep-water fish, pink to brown. Has a naked, scaleless head and soft body. Inhabits bathyal bottoms of the southeastern Pacific.
